title: Imane Khelif: Boxer addresses Olympics gender row ahead of gold-medal bout | SBS News
description: Algerian boxer Imane Khelif says she "doesn't care" about the Olympics gender row she has been caught up in after winning her semi-final. She'll now fight for gold.
